caveats: Only 10 epochs (pilot) — degree-4 poly with 5 params on 10 points may overfit
High R^2 layers tend to have very small alpha_std (<0.001) — near-constant alignment
Updated with UDWDC-v2 and new v2 ablation variants (21 total methods)
recommendation: Alignment signal carries information beyond time. Proceed with direct alignment comparisons.
notes: Updated analysis with 21 methods (1150 combos). Conv layers most time-predictable (mean R^2=0.6914), FC layers least (mean R^2=0.3747). UDWDC_v2_Ki_only has lowest mean R^2 (0.4495, 0% >0.85) — most non-temporal alignment. UDWDC_PI_control has highest mean R^2 (0.6344, 26.7% >0.85) — most time-predictable.
